BP_ChengJiu_MianJuLevel_10.name: Soulmask
BP_ChengJiu_MianJuLevel_10.description: The fusion of a weak soul and mysterious mask - this is the beginning of eternity, and the origin of all differences: Achieve Awareness Strength 10 to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_MianJuLevel_20.name: It's getting better.
BP_ChengJiu_MianJuLevel_20.description: Nourished by the mask, the ancient mystical knowledge brings a sense of kindness to the terrifying jungle: Achieve Awareness Strength 20 to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_MianJuLevel_30.name: More, better, farther
BP_ChengJiu_MianJuLevel_30.description: With more friends, resources, weapons, and armor, you get to eat more and travel further: Achieve Awareness Strength 30 to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_MianJuLevel_40.name: Iron and Blood
BP_ChengJiu_MianJuLevel_40.description: A dull journey is one without obstacles; But if obstacles arise, let iron and blood clear the way: Achieve Awareness Strength 40 to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_MianJuLevel_50.name: Stacked Civilizations
BP_ChengJiu_MianJuLevel_50.description: The past glory vanished into the passage of time, and a new civilization rises above the ruins: Achieve Awareness Strength 50 to unlock Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_MianJuLevel_60.name: Do not respond!
BP_ChengJiu_MianJuLevel_60.description: Besides oneself, there are probably no other secrets here: Achieve Awareness Strength 60 to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ShiBan_001.name: Ancient Scholar
BP_ChengJiu_ShiBan_001.description: Unveil the secrets of all ancient tablets to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_ShiBan_002.name: Saint Scholar
BP_ChengJiu_ShiBan_002.description: Unveil the secrets of all divine tablets to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_TanSUoDian_002.name: Rainforest Hiking
BP_ChengJiu_TanSUoDian_002.description: Discover all exploration points in the rainforest area to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_TanSUoDian_003.name: Hill Hiking
BP_ChengJiu_TanSUoDian_003.description: Discover all exploration points in the hill area to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_TanSUoDian_004.name: Wetland Hiking
BP_ChengJiu_TanSUoDian_004.description: Discover all exploration points in the wetland area to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_TanSUoDian_005.name: Plateau Hiking
BP_ChengJiu_TanSUoDian_005.description: Discover all exploration points in the plateau area to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_TanSUoDian_006.name: Volcano Hiking
BP_ChengJiu_TanSUoDian_006.description: Discover all exploration points in the volcano area to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_TanSUoDian_007.name: Snow Mountain Hiking
BP_ChengJiu_TanSUoDian_007.description: Discover all exploration points in the snow mountain area to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JianChiHu01.name: Beneath the Claws
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JianChiHu01.description: "Shh! See those cleanly broken giant trees? Watch out for its claws! Roll away quickly to avoid it!": Defeat Fierce Saber-toothed Predator to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JianChiHu02.name: Opponent's Bone Spear and Bone Shield
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JianChiHu02.description: "Are your bones harder than the head of this ferocious cat? Uh… I mean no offense, but you need at least a bronze weapon that is bigger than yourself": Defeat Berserk Saber-toothed Predator to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JianChiHu03.name: Mature Saber-toothed Predator Hunter
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JianChiHu03.description: "CHARGE!": Defeat Saber-toothed Predator of Doom to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_MGW01.name: Don't be poisoned to death
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_MGW01.description: "Don't forget to bring anti-poison potions. I don't want to be pulling your fragile skull out of that disgusting pus": Defeat Poison Fogfrog to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_MGW02.name: Waterbag Hoglet
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_MGW02.description: "What are inflated water bags afraid of? Needles, of course! The little kittens who listened to my advice still have nine lives!": Defeat Berserk Fogfrog to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_MGW03.name: Mature Fogfrog Hunter
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_MGW03.description: "CHARGE!": Defeat Fogfrog of Doom to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JuYuan01.name: Face Off
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JuYuan01.description: "He is tall, strong, and can jump a jungle. There is no way you can catch up if he runs, but you can win him by having a harder shield than he does!": Defeat Almighty Vajra Ape to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JuYuan02.name: Protracted War
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JuYuan02.description: "Plan your stamina well for a chance to get loots. Otherwise, you'll probably be squashed by that beast": Defeat Berserk Vajra Ape to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JuYuan03.name: Mature Vajra Ape Hunter
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JuYuan03.description: "CHARGE!": Defeat Vajra Ape of Doom to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JiNiao01.name: Suncover Shadow
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JiNiao01.description: "Heavy weapons are no use against it, but bows and arrows are extremely effective": Defeat Sky-shading Tempest Griffin to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JiNiao02.name: You! Get down here!
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JiNiao02.description: "I was just shouting for fun, but when the wind stopped, it actually came down! That was scary!": Defeat Berserk Tempest Griffin to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JiNiao03.name: Mature Tempest Griffin Hunter
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_JiNiao03.description: "CHARGE!": Defeat Tempest Griffin of Doom to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_MMX01.name: Stylish Ice Sculpture
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_MMX01.description: “I-I-I feel really c-c-cold… Did s-s-someone… bring fire…?": Defeat Titan Mammoth to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_MMX02.name: Cooling Blood
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_MMX02.description: "This darn padded coat is so heavy, I'm going to take it off. What's that in the sky? A colorful alpaca riding and dancing on an ostrich…? Aah… This feels warm...": Defeat Berserk Mammoth to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_MMX03.name: Seasoned Mammoth Hunter
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_MMX03.description: "CHARGE!": Defeat Mammoth of Doom to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShouLie01.name: 1 in 10
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShouLie01.description: "This old and worn-out wooden bow is lousy. If I could use chieftain's bow, I'm I'm sure I'd hit the bullseye with one arrow": Defeat 1 Lv.10 Green Prey to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShouLie02.name: Fine Pelt
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShouLie02.description: "We've been tracking this beast for twenty days and our chance has finally come. See this skin without any arrow holes? That's my masterpiece… Burp.": Defeat 1 Lv.20 Blue Precious Prey to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShouLie03.name: An experienced and calculating marksman
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShouLie03.description: "The cornmeal will be finished tomorrow. It's also about time that it will be out foraging, what perfect timing": Defeat 1 Lv.30 Purple Peerless Prey to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShouLie04.name: Uncommon loot
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShouLie04.description: "I entered the thick jungle countless times but have only seen such prey several times. I must catch it and hang it beside my fire pit": Defeat 1 Lv.40 Orange Legendary Prey to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShouLie05.name: Hunter or Prey?
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShouLie05.description: "When I saw it twenty years ago, I lost my brother. When I found it ten years ago, I lost my eyes. This time, we will decide the winner by fighting to our deaths!": Defeat 1 Lv.50 Red Mythic Prey to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShouLie06.name: Mythic
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShouLie06.description: "As I watch these kids pulling the bow, it reminds me of my eldest son": Defeat 1 Lv.60 Red Mythic Prey to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_Zhu_10.name: Galloping Dinner
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_Zhu_10.description: These shy, hard-to-near creatures are actually the easiest food to get: Defeat 10 Turkeys to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_Lang_10.name: Lifelong Enemy
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_Lang_10.description: The bloody crisis spreads through the thickets, while a faint green light shimmers in the night: Defeat 10 Jaguars to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_DaXiang_10.name: Desperate Porcupine
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_DaXiang_10.description: Covered in spears, these big creatures are darting about like frantic boars: Defeat 10 Giant Elephants to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_HuangShi_10.name: Remaining Badasses
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_HuangShi_10.description: In the chilling, starless wilderness lies a feline baring its sharp and merciless claws: Defeat 10 Wild Lions to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi01.name: Rock Breaker
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi01.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Northern Rainforest: Defeat the Tribal Priest to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi02.name: Retroreflector
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi02.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Western Rainforest: Defeat the Tribal Priest to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi03.name: Observer
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi03.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Mangrove: Defeat the Tribal Priest to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi04.name: Blood Drinker
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi04.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Pit Hill: Defeat the Tribal Priest to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi05.name: Astrologer
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi05.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Lakeside Forest: Defeat the Tribal Priest to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi06.name: Snake Heart
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi06.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Table Mountain: Defeat the Tribal Priest to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi07.name: Hardbone
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi07.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Great Prairie: Defeat the Tribal Priest to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi08.name: Bloodletter
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi08.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Giant Wood Forest: Defeat the Tribal Priest to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi09.name: Venom
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi09.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Southern Wasteland: Defeat the Tribal Priest to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi10.name: Slayer
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi10.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Barren Meadow: Defeat the Tribal Priest to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi11.name: Forester
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi11.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Dark Forest: Defeat the Tribal Priest to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi12.name: Butcher
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi12.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Frostleaf Grove: Defeat the Tribal Priest to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi13.name: Cold Toxin
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ZhaiZi13.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Alpine Land: Defeat the Tribal Priest to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_DiMianYiJi01.name: Jungle Foes
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_DiMianYiJi01.description: The Plunderer Leaders occupying the treasure lands are infamous for their savagery: Defeat any of the 3 Plunderer Leaders in the ground ruins of Western Rainforest to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_DiMianYiJi02.name: Volcanic Forest Secret
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_DiMianYiJi02.description: The Plunderer Leaders occupying the treasure lands are infamous for their savagery: Defeat the Plunderer Leader in the ground ruins of Volcanic Forest to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_DiMianYiJi03.name: Iceblood Savage
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_DiMianYiJi03.description: The Plunderer Leaders occupying the treasure lands are infamous for their savagery: Defeat any of the 2 Plunderer Leaders in the ground ruins of Alpine Land to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong01.name: Hidden Pearl: Rift Valley
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong01.description: It's as if we're looking at an elusive fragment of a disconnected civilization, with danger and opportunity lay concealed in the dust of antiquity: Defeat the Guardian of the Rift Valley ruins to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong02.name: Hidden Pearl: Jungle Cave
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong02.description: It's as if we're looking at an elusive fragment of a disconnected civilization, with danger and opportunity lay concealed in the dust of antiquity: Defeat the Guardian of the Jungle Cave ruins to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong03.name: Hidden Pearl: Giant Crater
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong03.description: It's as if we're looking at an elusive fragment of a disconnected civilization, with danger and opportunity lay concealed in the dust of antiquity: Defeat the Guardian of the Giant Crater ruins to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong04.name: Hidden Pearl: Scorching Volcano
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong04.description: It's as if we're looking at an elusive fragment of a disconnected civilization, with danger and opportunity lay concealed in the dust of antiquity: Defeat the Guardian of the Scorching Volcano ruins to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong05.name: Hidden Pearl: Frost Canyon
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong05.description: It's as if we're looking at an elusive fragment of a disconnected civilization, with danger and opportunity lay concealed in the dust of antiquity: Defeat the Guardian of the Frost Canyon ruins to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong06.name: Hidden Pearl: River Valley
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong06.description: It's as if we're looking at an elusive fragment of a disconnected civilization, with danger and opportunity lay concealed in the dust of antiquity: Defeat the Guardian of the River Valley ruins to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong07.name: Hidden Pearl: Wetland
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong07.description: It's as if we're looking at an elusive fragment of a disconnected civilization, with danger and opportunity lay concealed in the dust of antiquity: Defeat the Guardian of the Wetland ruins to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong08.name: Hidden Pearl: Northern Wasteland
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong08.description: It's as if we're looking at an elusive fragment of a disconnected civilization, with danger and opportunity lay concealed in the dust of antiquity: Defeat the Guardian of the Northern Wasteland ruins to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong09.name: Hidden Pearl: Dark Forest
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGong09.description: It's as if we're looking at an elusive fragment of a disconnected civilization, with danger and opportunity lay concealed in the dust of antiquity: Defeat the Guardian of the Dark Forest ruins to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGongFinal.name: Central Core
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YiJiDiGongFinal.description: The last Guardian of the disconnected civilization. Defeat the hidden Guardian in the Frost Canyon to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_ManRen_zhenShe_2.name: Die, or follow my footsteps.
BP_ChengJiu_ManRen_zhenShe_2.description: Show the mask's power: Deter two dying barbarians to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ManRen_zhaoMu_3.name: Tribe Prosperity
BP_ChengJiu_ManRen_zhaoMu_3.description: Your clan is already prosperous: Recruit 3 tribesmen to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ManRen_zhaoMu_100.name: Different people, different personalities
BP_ChengJiu_ManRen_zhaoMu_100.description: People come and go; you see new faces all the time: Recruit 100 tribesmen to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ManRen_KongZhi.name: Synchronization
BP_ChengJiu_ManRen_KongZhi.description: Show the mask's power by syncing thoughts with your tribesmen: Control any tribesman to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ManRen_MingLing.name: On My Command
BP_ChengJiu_ManRen_MingLing.description: Command any deployed tribesman to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ManRen_SiWang_3.name: Sacrifice
BP_ChengJiu_ManRen_SiWang_3.description: Ashes to ashes, dust to dust: Have 3 tribesmen dead to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ManRen_JingYing.name: Silent yet busy
BP_ChengJiu_ManRen_JingYing.description: Appoint any task to a tribesman to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_WenMing01.name: Bud of Habitat
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_WenMing01.description: More tribesmen are gathering around the fire, witnessing the emergence of a new tribe: Build a bonfire to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_WenMing02.name: Charcoal coated gold glitter
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_WenMing02.description: From this moment, the giant tree that withstands the bone axe will collapse, and the Jaguar becomes an easier opponent: Craft a Bronze Ingot to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_WenMing03.name: Flowing Flame
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_WenMing03.description: The skin radiates a crimson glow, while the eyes sparkle with determination. In this moment, the howl of the Wasteland Wolf goes unheeded: Craft an Iron Ingot to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_WenMing04.name: Flicker upon collision
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_WenMing04.description: The modern craftsmanship is limited. To get stronger, you need to advance deep into the ruins: Craft a Steel Ingot to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_PengRen01.name: Enough all you want!
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_PengRen01.description: Make a Cooked Potato to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_PengRen02.name: A full belly is a happy belly.
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_PengRen02.description: Cook a Premium Steak to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_PengRen03.name: Table Juice
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_PengRen03.description: Make Tequila to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_PengRen04.name: Afternoon Dessert
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_PengRen04.description: Make a Fried Pumpkin Ring to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_PengRen05.name: Joy on the Rocks
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_PengRen05.description: Make Iced Cocoa to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_JianZhu01.name: Building Block Master
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_JianZhu01.description: Craft a Wooden Foundation to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_JianZhu02.name: Certified Architect
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_JianZhu02.description: Craft a Stone Foundation to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_JianZhu03.name: Nameless Pileup Master
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_JianZhu03.description: Craft a Blackstone Foundation to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_JianZhu04.name: Lumberjack
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_JianZhu04.description: Build a Logging Yard to unlock this Trip Milestone.

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_MianJia01.name: Torch of Eternity
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_MianJia01.description: Unlock Mask - Torch of Eternity to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_MianJia02.name: Shadow Walker
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_MianJia02.description: Unlock Mask - Shadow Walker to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_MianJia03.name: Wilderness Mark
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_MianJia03.description: Unlock Mask - Wilderness Mark to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_MianJia04.name: Ironblood Guard
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_MianJia04.description: Unlock Mask - Ironblood Guard to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_MianJia05.name: Tactical Guidance
BP_ChengJiu_ZhiZao_MianJia05.description: Unlock Mask - Tactical Guidance to unlock this Trip Milestone

BP_ChengJiu_Collect_All.name: Immortal Soul
BP_ChengJiu_Collect_All.description: With consciousness uploaded and soul transcended, you will set forth on an otherwordly journey in search of a fabled paradise, unraveling the cosmic puzzles etched in the annals of time.

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_SenLuoE01.name: Fierce Sobek Crocodile
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_SenLuoE01.description: Defeat the Fierce Sobek Crocodile to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_SenLuoE02.name: Berserk Sobek Crocodile
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_SenLuoE02.description: Defeat the Berserk Sobek Crocodile to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_SenLuoE03.name: Sobek Crocodile of Doom
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_SenLuoE03.description: Defeat the Sobek Crocodile of Doom to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YinHunQuan01.name: Fierce Anubis Hound
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YinHunQuan01.description: Defeat the Fierce Anubis Hound to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YinHunQuan02.name: Berserk Anubis Hound
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YinHunQuan02.description: Defeat the Berserk Anubis Hound to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YinHunQuan03.name: Anubis Hound of Doom
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_YinHunQuan03.description: Defeat the Anubis Hound of Doom to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShengJiaChong01.name: Fierce Onyx Scarab
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShengJiaChong01.description: Defeat the Fierce Onyx Scarab to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShengJiaChong02.name: Berserk Onyx Scarab
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShengJiaChong02.description: Defeat the Berserk Onyx Scarab to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShengJiaChong03.name: Onyx Scarab of Doom
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_ShengJiaChong03.description: Defeat the Onyx Scarab of Doom to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi01.name: Toughbone
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi01.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of the River Delta: Defeat the Tribal Leader to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi02.name: Ironfoot
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi02.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Moon Bay: Defeat the Tribal Leader to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi03.name: Sharpskull
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi03.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Rock Lake: Defeat the Tribal Leader to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi04.name: Moltenpalm
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi04.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Darkriver Valley: Defeat the Tribal Leader to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi05.name: Stoneclaw
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi05.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Three River Junction: Defeat the Tribal Leader to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi06.name: Bloodfang
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi06.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Rockhenge Desert: Defeat the Tribal Leader to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi07.name: Spikebone
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi07.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Sandcry Gorge: Defeat the Tribal Leader to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi08.name: Scareye
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_ZhaiZi08.description: Bare your fangs, showing everyone that you're the true boss of Star Plain: Defeat the Tribal Leader to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong01.name: Transmuter
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong01.description: Defeat the guardian of the surface ruins in the Coastal Dunes to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong02.name: Sandburier
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong02.description: Defeat the guardian of the surface ruins in the Sunken City to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong03.name: King of Red Sand
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong03.description: Defeat the guardian of the surface ruins in the Red Dunes to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong04.name: King of Wilderness
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong04.description: Defeat the guardian of the pyramid in the Star Plain to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong05.name: King of Fiery Flames
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong05.description: Defeat the guardian of the pyramid in the Burning Highland to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong06.name: Patroller
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong06.description: Defeat the guardian of the Ancient Ruins Dungeon in the Wind-eroded Dunes to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong07.name: Observer
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong07.description: Defeat the guardian of the Ancient Ruins Dungeon in the Scorching Desert to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong08.name: Trailblazer
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong08.description: Defeat the Guardian in the Blackstone Cliff Ancient Ruins Dungeon to unlock this Trip Milestone. (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands)

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong09.name: Destroyer
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong09.description: Defeat the guardian of the Sulfur Pool Holy Ruins to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong10.name: Huntsman
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong10.description: Defeat the guardian of the Holy Ruins in the Eye of Sands to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong11.name: Divine Punishment
BP_ChengJiu_Kill_AJ_YiJiDiGong11.description: Defeat the guardian of the Holy Ruins in the Burning Highland to unlock this Trip Milestone (Requires DLC: Shifting Sands).

BP_ChengJiu_AJ_Collect_All.name: Rise in the Shifting Sands
BP_ChengJiu_AJ_Collect_All.description: As the sun and moon cycle and the rivers ebb and flow, your name will be sung forever across the Shifting Sands, and your bonfire will burn forever strong and bright.
